observations.finding: D1 context features carry most predictive info for forward returns. d1_ema_spread_50 leads: |r|=0.088 (p=3.6e-33) at k=60. D1 regime binary also significant: |r|=0.064 at k=40.
Information concentrates at longer horizons. Mean |Spearman r| across all features: k=1 (0.013) to k=60 (0.034), monotonically increasing.
Volume features near-zero predictive info. VDO: |r|=0.027, MI=0.006 bits. log_volume: |r|=0.015. Confirms Obs15 and Obs23.
Volatility has moderate linear info (natr_14: |r|=0.040) but highest nonlinear info (rvol_60: MI=0.116 bits). Consistent with asymmetric vol regime effects (Obs13).
EMA spread features > raw returns at all horizons. ema_spread_120 |r|=0.074 vs ret_20 |r|=0.015. Spread encodes smoothed trend direction and magnitude.

propositions.statement: Exit loss control is the primary lever for Sharpe maximization.
propositions.testable: Among matched-entry configs, tighter trail -> higher Sharpe (up to premature-exit limit)

propositions.statement: Dual-EMA crossover captures most exploitable trend information.
propositions.testable: E1 class produces higher Sharpe than E2/E3 at matched DOF

propositions.statement: Longer holding periods capture more alpha because information concentrates at longer horizons.
propositions.testable: Wider trail multiplier -> higher Sharpe with diminishing returns

propositions.statement: D1 regime filtering modestly improves Sharpe by avoiding negative-drift periods.
propositions.testable: Adding F1 improves Sharpe by 0.02-0.10, reduces trades by 30-50%

propositions.statement: Volume features carry zero exploitable information for BTC H4 returns.
propositions.testable: VDO filter HURTS Sharpe on any admissible combination

propositions.statement: Composite exits (trail OR reversal) provide modest, non-uniform improvement over simple trails.
propositions.testable: X3 matches or modestly exceeds X1/X2, not dramatically

propositions.statement: Churn is not a meaningful design criterion for this dataset.
propositions.testable: Anti-churn mechanisms add no Sharpe improvement

propositions.statement: Volatility carries moderate nonlinear information but is inconsistent as a filter.
